summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with end-to-end experience executing the full ML lifecycle — from data cleansing and feature engineering to model selection, validation, and production deployment. Trained a fine-tuned DistilBERT transformer ensemble with rigorous architecture comparison across four models using ROC curves and SHAP analysis, built NLP pipelines processing large-scale text data, and deployed ML inference workloads on Kubernetes with Docker for scalable production use. Experienced working with Python, PyTorch, and TensorFlow across voice, text, and computer vision tasks, with a track record of translating research techniques into clean, maintainable production code.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, HuggingFace Transformers, NLP, Large Language Models (LLMs), Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Object Detection, Model Fine-tuning, Feature Engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Prompt Engineering, SHAP, Model Evaluation
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
